instructions.original_snippets: Target: 1200-1500 tokens MAX — context files must stay within the token budget to survive context window compaction.
NEVER overwrite existing context without reading it first — Silent overwrites lose prior session decisions.
If status is done or parked → move file to .context/session/done/ subfolder automatically.
NEVER save context at the start of a session — save at meaningful checkpoints, not at startup.
Use heading Next (not todo or pending) — Claude Code compaction grep-matches next/todo/pending/remaining keywords for survival priority.
NEVER skip the INDEX.md upsert via scripts/upsert-index.sh — the index is the authoritative pointer for load-context.
